seo.title: Highland Park TX Plumbing, Electrical, AC Repair & Duct Cleaning | Dallas
seo.description: Expert plumbing, electrical, air conditioning repair, and vent duct cleaning in Dallas, TX. Trusted by Highland Park homeowners. Call (469) 864-6982 for fast, reliable service.

hero.headline: Plumbing, Electrical, AC & Duct Cleaning – All in One Call
hero.subheadline: Your home’s comfort and safety are our priority. From emergency repairs to routine maintenance, our certified technicians deliver top-quality service with a smile.

featureSections.title: Comprehensive Home Services – One Trusted Provider
featureSections.body: We eliminate the hassle of juggling multiple contractors. Our team handles everything from leaky faucets to complete AC replacements and duct cleaning, ensuring your home runs smoothly year-round.
featureSections.cardBody: Fast, reliable fixes for leaks, clogs, and more. Our plumbers arrive fully stocked to solve most issues in one visit.

featureSections.title: Vent Duct Cleaning – Improve Indoor Air Quality
featureSections.body: Over time, dust, allergens, and debris accumulate in your ductwork, reducing efficiency and air quality. Our thorough cleaning process removes contaminants, helping your HVAC system run better and your family breathe easier.
bullets: Removes dust, pollen, and pet dander
Boosts HVAC efficiency – saves on energy bills
featureSections.cardBody: We use HEPA-filtered vacuum equipment and agitation tools to dislodge and extract debris from your entire duct system.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed & Insured
whyChooseUs.description: All our technicians are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: No surprises. We provide a detailed estimate before any work begins.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.description: Most emergencies handled the same day – we’re here when you need us.

whyChooseUs.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
whyChooseUs.description: If you’re not happy, we’ll make it right. Your trust is our top priority.

testimonials.quote: They fixed a burst pipe at 2am and were incredibly professional. Saved our basement!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.quote: Our AC wasn’t cooling at all. They diagnosed and repaired it in under two hours. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: James T.

testimonials.quote: Duct cleaning made a huge difference – less dust and allergy symptoms. Worth every penny.
testimonials.author: Linda K.

cta.headline: Ready to Experience Top-Notch Service?
cta.subheadline: Call us or book online for a free estimate. We’re standing by to help.

servicesPage.intro: From plumbing emergencies to electrical upgrades, AC repairs, and duct cleaning, our certified team delivers expert solutions for Dallas and Highland Park homes. Every service comes with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

services.title: Plumbing Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert plumbing services for leaks, clogs, water heaters, and more.
services.longDescription: Our plumbers handle everything from minor faucet repairs to major pipe replacements. We use advanced diagnostic tools to pinpoint issues quickly, saving you time and money. Whether it's a dripping faucet or a burst pipe, we've got you covered.
benefits: Upfront pricing with no hidden fees

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We inspect your plumbing system using camera scopes and pressure tests to identify the root cause.

process.title: Repair Plan
process.description: We provide a clear, itemized quote and explain the recommended solution before any work begins.

process.title: Quality Repair
process.description: Our technicians complete the repair efficiently, then test everything to ensure it's working perfectly.

faqs.question: Do you offer emergency plumbing services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we’re available 24/7 for emergencies. Call (469) 864-6982 for immediate assistance.

faqs.question: How much does a typical plumbing repair cost?
faqs.answer: Costs vary, but we provide free estimates upfront. Most minor repairs range from $150 to $500.

services.title: Electrical Repair & Installation
services.shortDescription: Safe, reliable electrical services for your home.
services.longDescription: From flickering lights to full rewiring, our electricians handle all residential electrical needs. We prioritize safety and code compliance, ensuring your home’s electrical system is reliable and up to date.
benefits: All work meets or exceeds local codes
Free safety inspections with every service

process.title: Assessment
process.description: We evaluate your electrical system, checking for hazards like outdated wiring or overloaded circuits.

process.title: Solution Design
process.description: We recommend the best solution, from simple repairs to panel upgrades, with transparent pricing.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: Our electricians perform the work safely, then test every outlet and fixture to ensure proper function.

faqs.question: Do you install EV chargers?
faqs.answer: Yes, we install Level 2 EV chargers. We’ll assess your panel capacity and handle the entire installation.

faqs.question: How long does a typical electrical repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs, like replacing a switch or outlet, take 1-2 hours. Larger projects may take longer.

services.title: Air Conditioning Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Keep your home cool with expert AC services.
services.longDescription: Our HVAC technicians are trained to diagnose and repair all makes and models of air conditioning systems. We offer routine maintenance to prevent breakdowns and extend the life of your unit.
benefits: Factory-trained technicians for all major brands

process.title: System Check
process.description: We inspect your AC unit, checking refrigerant levels, coils, and electrical components.

process.title: Diagnosis
process.description: We identify the issue using advanced diagnostic tools and explain it in simple terms.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We perform the repair and run the system to ensure it’s cooling properly and efficiently.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend annual maintenance, ideally in spring, to keep your system running efficiently.

faqs.question: Do you offer financing for AC replacement?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer flexible financing options for new AC installations. Ask about our specials!

services.title: Vent Duct Cleaning
services.shortDescription: Improve indoor air quality with professional duct cleaning.
services.longDescription: Our comprehensive duct cleaning service removes dust, allergens, mold, and debris from your HVAC ductwork. This improves air quality, reduces allergens, and helps your system run more efficiently.
benefits: Reduces dust and allergens in your home
Improves HVAC efficiency – lowers energy bills

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We inspect your ductwork using cameras to assess the level of contamination.

process.title: Agitation & Extraction
process.description: We use specialized brushes and air whips to dislodge debris, then extract it with a powerful HEPA vacuum.

process.title: Sanitization (optional)
process.description: We can apply an EPA-approved sanitizer to eliminate bacteria and mold spores for a deeper clean.

faqs.question: How often should I have my ducts cleaned?
faqs.answer: Every 3-5 years, or more often if you have pets, allergies, or recent renovations.

faqs.question: Will duct cleaning reduce my energy bills?
faqs.answer: Yes, clean ducts allow your HVAC system to operate more efficiently, potentially lowering your energy costs.

about.headline: Your Home’s Comfort Is Our Mission
about.mission: To provide Dallas and Highland Park homeowners with honest, high-quality plumbing, electrical, AC, and duct cleaning services that exceed expectations.
story: Founded in 2009, Highland Park Service began as a small plumbing company with a big vision: to bring integrity and craftsmanship back to home services. Over the years, we expanded to include electrical, air conditioning, and duct cleaning, always with the same commitment to excellence. Our team has grown, but our values haven’t changed – we treat every home like our own.

Today, we’re proud to be the go-to provider for hundreds of families in the Dallas area. Our technicians undergo continuous training to stay ahead of the latest technologies and best practices. We believe in building long-term relationships, not just fixing problems. When you call us, you’re not just a job – you’re a neighbor.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, and we’re transparent in all our dealings.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: Every job is done right the first time, using top-grade materials and techniques.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and your time with the utmost respect.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to serve our neighbors and give back to the Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: We’re here to help with all your home service needs. Call or fill out the form for a free estimate.
